user.title: Storm Watch Setup
user.description: Select your weather forecast entities and configure alert thresholds. You will need one hourly and one daily forecast entity — these are provided by your weather integration (e.g. BOM).

data_description.hourly_weather_entity: Used for near-term storm detection (1–12 hour windows). Choose the entity that provides hourly forecasts.
data_description.daily_weather_entity: Used to check for storm conditions tomorrow. Choose the entity that provides daily forecasts.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Storm Watch fetches fresh forecast data. Lower values use more resources.
data_description.wind_speed_emergency: Wind speeds above this value within 1 hour trigger an Emergency alert.
data_description.wind_speed_warning: Wind speeds above this value within 3 hours trigger a Warning alert.
data_description.precipitation_emergency: Precipitation above this value within 1 hour contributes to an Emergency alert.

error.entity_not_found: This weather entity could not be found. Make sure your weather integration is set up and loaded.

abort.already_configured: Storm Watch is already configured with these weather entities.

init.title: Storm Watch Options
init.description: Adjust alert thresholds and update frequency. Changes take effect immediately.

data_description.scan_interval: How often Storm Watch fetches fresh forecast data.
data_description.wind_speed_emergency: Wind speeds above this value within 1 hour trigger an Emergency alert.
data_description.wind_speed_warning: Wind speeds above this value within 3 hours trigger a Warning alert.
data_description.precipitation_emergency: Precipitation above this value within 1 hour contributes to an Emergency alert.
